## Checklist
- [ ] Branched off `main` (`feature/…` or `fix/…`); this PR targets `main`
- [ ] Did **not** bump the rev in `public/release-notes.js` (only Dan bumps the rev)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, credential files, `azure-backup-*.json`)
- [ ] Followed the `CLAUDE.md` hard rules
- [ ] If `server.js` / `db.js` / a service changed, called it out — prod needs a process restart for those to take effect
